utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes five items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each item is fully specified with detailed coverage descriptions and associated costs. Health coverage lists physical and mental health components and total cost; property coverage details item types and total cost; travel coverage includes plan details, addons, and total cost; additional_services specifies concierge and enhancements with total cost; total_budget provides full monthly and annual breakdown. Therefore, all five items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes several categories. For health coverage, the physical health plan named 'PrimeCare Premium Physical Health with global coverage...' clearly corresponds to the 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health, which has a rating of 10. The mental health coverage is integrated and described similarly to the PrimeCare Premium Plan, which under primary_health_coverage.mental_health also has a rating of 10. For property coverage, the description of luxury items and high-value possessions matches the 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' under property_protection.home_content, rated 10. For travel coverage, the 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan with global coverage...' maps directly to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.PrimeTravel Premium Plan, rated 10. The adventure travel add-on for children's international programs corresponds to 'Adventure Travel Coverage' under travel_enhancement_services, rated 6. In additional services, the 'Premium medical network addon (€75)' corresponds to 'Premium Medical Network' under travel_enhancement_services, rated 10, and '24/7 concierge services' corresponds to 'Concierge Services' in travel_enhancement_services, rated 8. Therefore, the mapped ratings are derived accordingly.
